verses.arabicText: عَيْنًۭا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًۭا
verses.translationText: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allah will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].

verses.arabicText: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًۭا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًۭا
verses.translationText: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.

verses.arabicText: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًۭا وَيَتِيمًۭا وَأَسِيرًا
verses.translationText: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,

verses.arabicText: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءًۭ وَلَا شُكُورًا
verses.translationText: [Saying], "We feed you only for the countenance of Allah. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًۭا قَمْطَرِيرًۭا
verses.translationText: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."

verses.arabicText: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةًۭ وَسُرُورًۭا
verses.translationText: So Allah will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness

verses.arabicText: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةًۭ وَحَرِيرًۭا
verses.translationText: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].

verses.arabicText: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ ۖ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًۭا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًۭا
verses.translationText: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold.

verses.arabicText: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًۭا
verses.translationText: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.

verses.arabicText: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍۢ مِّن فِضَّةٍۢ وَأَكْوَابٍۢ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠
verses.translationText: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],

verses.arabicText: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍۢ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًۭا
verses.translationText: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.

verses.arabicText: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًۭا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
verses.translationText: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger

verses.arabicText: عَيْنًۭا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًۭا
verses.translationText: [From] a fountain within Paradise named Salsabeel.

verses.arabicText: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌۭ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًۭا مَّنثُورًۭا
verses.translationText: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.

verses.arabicText: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًۭا وَمُلْكًۭا كَبِيرًا
verses.translationText: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.

verses.arabicText: عَٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌۭ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌۭ ۖ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍۢ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًۭا طَهُورًا
verses.translationText: Upon the inhabitants will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءًۭ وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
verses.translationText: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."

verses.arabicText: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًۭا
verses.translationText: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muhammad], the Qur'an progressively.

verses.arabicText: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًۭا
verses.translationText: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].

verses.arabicText: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةًۭ وَأَصِيلًۭا
verses.translationText: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening
